message:
fix(codegen+analysis): UnifiedInt support for module-level reassignment and comptime assignments

- Add .raise_stmt detection to allocator_analysis.zig for error propagation
- Add is_module_level check to assign.zig for module-level variable reassignment
- Add is_unified_int_target detection to assign_comptime.zig for wrapping
  integer literals in UnifiedInt.fromI64() when reassigning to UnifiedInt vars

This fixes the 'expected UnifiedInt, found comptime_int' error when
assigning large integers (2**31-1, etc.) to module-level UnifiedInt variables.
